scripts.clean: pnpm hardhat clean && rimraf artifacts cache .turbo

scripts.deploy:staging:arbitrum:portal-factory: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id staging_arbitrum --verify --network arbitrum --strategy create2 ignition/modules/PortalFactoryAggregator.ts
scripts.deploy:staging:ethereum:portal-factory: hardhat ignition deploy --deployment-id staging_ethereum --verify --network ethereum --strategy create2 ignition/modules/PortalFactory.ts
